decisions.rationale: The observation already resolves to base_record_id 'project_first-second-ave-sbs', which exists in the registry with matching source 2010_04_29_brt_1st2nd_cac4 among its source_ids. The observation refers to the same real-world project — M15 Select Bus Service on First and Second Avenues from South Ferry to 125th Street, launching October 10, 2010 — and the registry record already captures this. No link to a different registry record is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M15 Select Bus Service begins: October 10, 2010
SELECT BUS SERVICE IS COMING TO FIRST AVENUE/SECOND AVENUE About the Corridor • 8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125th Street • Over 57,000 weekday riders on the M15
